‚ãÜ‚≠íÀö.‚ãÜ Little Sneak Peak ‚ãÜ.Àö‚≠í‚ãÜ

The night was young, laughter from the two friends erupted from the rooftop. Ivan and User sat beside one another in those metal chairs that were always up there. Both of them had their fair share of drinks, those bloxy cola beers that Ivan likes so much.

They spoke of silly stories, told stupid jokes that would have never gotten laughs outside of this situation. It was a nice moment.

The soft light of the moon seemed to shine upon Ivan just perfectly, like it was a spotlight just made for him. Maybe it was the alcohol coursing through the two's veins, maybe it was a feeling User had long ago deeply buried, but Ivan looked so nice tonight.
